scenarios.desc: Challenges a detector change with no no-over-fire test
scenarios.input: Diff summary: broadened an analyzer detector to catch invalid input. Tests only cover the invalid input. No test covers the valid suppression form that used to pass. Review the diff.
scenarios.rationale: Critic should flag missing mirror-obligation coverage for over-fire risk.

scenarios.desc: Challenges generated mirror drift when a template changes
scenarios.input: Diff summary: changed templates/agents/implementer.shared.md. The diff includes src/copilot-cli/agents/implementer.agent.md but not src/vs-code-agents/implementer.agent.md or hand-maintained install copies. Review the diff.
scenarios.rationale: Critic should flag generated-file and install-copy drift.
